sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 44273 — TITUS AS CAESAR, 69-79 C.E. AV Aureus (7.04 gms), Rome Mint, 72-73 C.E. NGC Ch F, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Ex-Jewelry, Brushed.
To view all items from the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissber
sales.description:
TITUS AS CAESAR, 69-79 C.E. AV Aureus (7.04 gms), Rome Mint, 72-73 C.E. NGC Ch F, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Ex-Jewelry, Brushed.
To view all items from the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissberg Collection, click  here.
RIC-370 (Vespasian); Calico-722; Hendin-6497. Obverse: Laureate bust right; Reverse: Titus in quadriga right, holding branch and scepter. Despite evidence of removal from jewelry, this Aureus offers bold strike and good appeal, despite its drawbacks.

From the Rabbi Vict...
